title: Selling without a legal entity
description: Selling as a sole proprietor exposes personal assets to any claim or lawsuit
treatment: Form an LLC before accepting payments — see knowledge/business-formation.md

title: No written terms of service
description: Without ToS buyers have no contract — disputes are harder to win and chargebacks are more likely
treatment: Create and publish ToS before listing any product — see knowledge/contracts.md

title: Copyright not registered
description: Unregistered works limit you to actual damages — statutory damages require registration
treatment: Register core prompt files with the U.S. Copyright Office — see knowledge/copyright.md

title: AI output liability
description: If users act on AI-generated advice and are harmed you could face claims
treatment: Add AI disclaimer to ToS and in-product warnings — see knowledge/ai-specific-considerations.md

title: Platform IP clauses
description: Marketplace agreements may claim licenses to your content
treatment: Read seller agreements carefully before listing — see knowledge/contracts.md

title: GDPR non-compliance
description: Selling to EU customers without GDPR-compliant privacy policy carries significant fines
treatment: Add GDPR-compliant privacy policy if selling internationally — see knowledge/privacy-and-terms.md
